rationale: The cited 2011 JMKR paper examines the same core mechanism (minimum-payment information/levels affecting repayment) using U.S. experiments and U.K. field data, which closely aligns with the citing paper’s focal constructs on minimum-payment defaults/anchoring and repayment outcomes. The citing note explicitly says it extends prior default and minimum-payment anchoring research, and the reference is a direct DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.48.spl.s60), so this is not an obvious incidental mention.
